task_completion.description: The Graphite dashboard is named 'DDoS Threat Triage'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the dashboard title 'DDoS Threat Triage' at the top of the Graphite dashboard interface.

task_completion.description: A graph titled 'Inbound Request Volume' is created with the correct target.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a graph with the title 'Inbound Request Volume'. The metric path, legend, or query editor should show 'servers.load_balancer.requests.count'.

task_completion.description: A graph titled 'Inbound Bandwidth Rate' is created with the correct target.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a graph with the title 'Inbound Bandwidth Rate'. The metric path, legend, or query editor should show 'nonNegativeDerivative(servers.ec2_instance_1.network.bytes_in)'.

task_completion.description: A graph titled 'Average Payload Size' is created with the correct target.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a graph with the title 'Average Payload Size'. The metric path, legend, or query editor should show 'divideSeries(nonNegativeDerivative(servers.ec2_instance_1.network.bytes_in), servers.load_balancer.requests.count)'.

task_completion.description: A graph titled 'Traffic Anomaly' is created with the correct target.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a graph with the title 'Traffic Anomaly'. The metric path, legend, or query editor should show 'diffSeries(servers.load_balancer.requests.count, movingAverage(servers.load_balancer.requests.count, 30))'.

task_completion.description: The dashboard contains exactly four graphs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Count the number of graphs displayed in the dashboard; there should be exactly four graphs visible.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Graphite web interface to create the dashboard.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Graphite web UI in a browser, not a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: The graphs are genuinely rendered by Graphite.
integrity.visual_evidence: The graphs should display actual data lines, axes, and grid lines, indicating the metrics were properly queried and rendered.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI by writing a JSON file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent opening a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) to manually write the dashboard JSON configuration.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target dashboard must be named 'DDoS Threat Triage'. The final evaluated state is exported correctly to /tmp/volumetric_ddos_triage_dashboard_result.json.
